task_completion.description: Visit the Tor Project check page to confirm Tor is working.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser is open and the address bar shows 'check.torproject.org', or the page 'Congratulations. This browser is configured to use Tor.' is visible, or the URL is present in the browser history.

task_completion.description: Bookmark the Tor check page as 'Tor Exit Node Checker' in a folder named 'Secure Research Sources'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bookmarks menu, Bookmarks Toolbar, Library window, or bookmark creation popup shows a folder named 'Secure Research Sources' containing a bookmark titled 'Tor Exit Node Checker'.
The address bar shows 'duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion', the DuckDuckGo onion homepage is visible, or the URL is present in the browser history.

task_completion.description: Bookmark the DuckDuckGo onion service as 'DuckDuckGo Private Search' in the 'Secure Research Sources' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bookmarks menu, Bookmarks Toolbar, Library window, or bookmark creation popup shows the 'Secure Research Sources' folder containing a bookmark titled 'DuckDuckGo Private Search'.

task_completion.description: Search DuckDuckGo onion for 'press freedom index reporters without borders'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A DuckDuckGo search results page is visible with the query 'press freedom index reporters without borders' in the search bar, or the corresponding search URL is visible in the browser history.

task_completion.description: Bookmark the first search result in a new folder named 'Press Freedom Research'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bookmarks menu, Bookmarks Toolbar, Library window, or bookmark creation popup shows a folder named 'Press Freedom Research' containing at least one bookmark (which should correspond to the Reporters Without Borders search result).

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Tor Browser application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Tor Browser GUI (with the onion menu/logo and standard Firefox-based UI elements), not a generic text editor, terminal window, or a different browser like Chrome.

integrity.description: Bookmarks and folders were created using the browser's graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of bookmark dialogs, the Library window, or interaction with the bookmark star icon, rather than terminal commands editing SQLite databases directly.

integrity.description: The search was actually executed on the DuckDuckGo website.
integrity.visual_evidence: The search results page displays standard DuckDuckGo web elements and formatting, rather than a locally mocked HTML file or plain text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required folders: 'Secure Research Sources' and 'Press Freedom Research'. Required bookmarks in 'Secure Research Sources': 'Tor Exit Node Checker' (URL must contain check.torproject.org) and 'DuckDuckGo Private Search' (URL must contain duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion). Required bookmarks in 'Press Freedom Research': At least 1 bookmark. Required visited URLs in history: check.torproject.org and duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion.
